name: Action-Adventure
_comment: Stuck-point thesis: players get blocked because they can't find the way forward, can't solve a puzzle, or can't beat a boss. The guide fixes this with a clear route + granular locations + boss breakdowns.
stuckPointThesis: Players get stuck because they can't find the next location, can't work out a puzzle mechanic, or hit a boss wall. Route clarity and boss depth are the primary levers. Build detail beats breadth.

schemaExtensions.notes: Every location the guide references must be in the locations registry. Every boss must have a BossFight entry with prep + phases + ifYouStruggle.

researchChecklistAdditions: Build the full Location registry before writing any steps — every place the guide names must have a canonical ref
Every boss needs: phase-by-phase tells + counters, recommended prep, a struggle-recovery option
Verify all puzzle solutions cross-checked across ≥2 sources
Note any missable items or one-way doors with the exact section window
Collect Triforce / collectible chart and salvage locations separately — these are high-confusion areas

qaGates.test: Every golden-path step that names a place or NPC states where it is and how to reach it. 'Go to the Temple' fails; 'Head south from the village to reach the Temple entrance at grid ref C4' passes.
Every actionable step that names a location includes a locationRef badge. Every location mentioned in any step exists in the game's locations[] registry.
Every section with a boss has a BossFight entry with: prep (recommendedItems, healthAdvice), ≥1 phase with tells+counter+damageWindow, ifYouStruggle, reward.
